caption: A man with light-colored, textured hair is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red and white patterned bowtie, and thin-rimmed glasses. He wears large black over-ear headphones and is positioned in profile, facing a black microphone on a stand. Behind him is a backdrop featuring a logo that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed image of a shield emblem. On-screen text overlays appear in red and white, stating "#REALTALK PODCAST" on the left and "REAL TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, capturing a professional podcasting environment.
